title: BAZADER Remote Control Cars RC Truck 1:18 High Speed 40KM/H RC Car - 4WD Off Road Truck Toys 2.4GHz All Terrains Toy for Adults Boys Kid with 2 Rechargeable Batteries
features: Fast Speed & Nimble Handling: Experience high-speed thrills with the 4WD Hailstorm rc car, hitting 40 KPH. Proportional steering and throttle offer precise agility, making turns and acceleration feel natural. Whether seasoned or new, this fast rc cars delivers excitement.

Dual Batteries & Extra Wheels for More Fun: Don’t let the excitement end! The rc truck offroad includes two 7.4V 1200mAh Li-Po batteries (60 total minutes, 30+ each) and 4 extra drift wheels for varied play. Its flexible yet strong PVC body and high-grip tires ensure a smooth ride. 99% Ready-To-Run—unbox and race! Note: a small accessory may be prone to loss—handle with care.

Reliable Control & Weatherproof: The 2.4GHz radio system ensures stable 50m control for smooth forward/brake/backward moves. IPX4 waterproof rating lets this rc truck tackle splashes/light rain—race on wet pavement, damp grass, or mud. (Cannot be soaked directly in water)

Durable Pro-Grade Build: Hobby-class components—ball bearings, dual solid gear differentials, 4WD suspension—boost durability and stability. The collision-resistant nylon chassis handles impacts easily. A speed switch lets kids and novices enjoy at their pace with this radio controlled cars.

All-Terrain Mastery: This 1:18 scale rc monster truck conquers yards, sand, gravel, concrete via independent suspension and metal-spring wheels. Adjustable shocks, upgraded treads, and reinforced hubs boost grip. A top gift for all, blending adventure and quality as a remote control monster truck.
